pi_items.source: Configuration verified in scripts/setup_jitsi.sh (line 21, 84, 155), config/docker-compose.yml (line 7, 25). Confirmed that Jitsi Meet runs at http://localhost:8080 with port mapping 8080:80. Room name 'BoardMeetingQ4' is alphanumeric and follows Jitsi Meet URL conventions.
Task description line 5 states: 'set Display Name to \'Director Alice\''. Verifier.py lines 38, 55 confirm this is the expected display name. Value is consistent across all task files.

Task description line 5 states: 'set Email to \'alice@corp.example.com\''. Verifier.py line 39 confirms this is the expected email. Email uses example.com (reserved for documentation per RFC 2606). Consistent across all task files.

Task description line 5 states: 'Mute your Microphone (ensure the icon is red/slashed)'. Verifier.py lines 61-67 check that audio_muted equals True. Export_result.sh line 44 extracts audio_muted state from APP.conference.isLocalAudioMuted().

Task description line 5 states: 'Keep your Camera enabled'. Verifier.py lines 69-75 check that video_muted equals False. Export_result.sh line 45 extracts video_muted state from APP.conference.isLocalVideoMuted().

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a professional profile in Jitsi Meet version stable-9753 (jitsi/web:stable-9753) running at http://localhost:8080. The meeting room is 'BoardMeetingQ4', accessed via URL http://localhost:8080/BoardMeetingQ4. Expected user profile settings are: display name 'Director Alice', email 'alice@corp.example.com' (using reserved example.com domain). Audio should be muted (microphone disabled) and video should be enabled (camera active). The verifier uses JavaScript console access to extract state from APP.conference methods and localStorage, scoring based on programmatic verification (60 points) and VLM visual verification (40 points). All metadata values are internally consistent with task description and environment configuration.
